description_long: This bistro consists of two main buildings joined by a sloped roof, with the taller building featuring three stories and mansard-style windows, and the shorter building having two stories. The facade is painted in a light gray-blue color, with black metal railings on the windows and a prominent dark awning above the main entrance. The ground level includes a garage door, a main entrance door, and large windows, while the side and rear areas open to a stone-paved courtyard with several round tables, chairs, and colorful umbrellas for outdoor dining. A stone retaining wall with a tree planter and steps leads up to a raised area, adding depth and urban character to the scene. The bistro is flanked by a stone wall on one side and a smaller, modern building with a striped awning and additional outdoor seating on the other. The overall setting evokes a European urban neighborhood, blending traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A multi-story European-style bistro with light gray-blue facades, mansard roofs, black railings, and a lively stone courtyard featuring outdoor tables, chairs, and umbrellas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with two buildings, garage door, main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse of the courtyard with umbrellas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone retaining wall, steps, and the smaller building with a striped awning and tree planter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the courtyard with multiple tables and umbrellas, the back of the main buildings, and the raised stone planter with a tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrances, sloped roof, and the connection between the two main buildings.
